subject: we’re DONE building quietly
body:
Hey Justin,

Last week was a big one for us at Morningside. We hosted our first-ever Morningside AI webinar - and over 2,000 people registered.

For the past three years, we've been quietly building. Working behind the scenes with organisations to become truly AI-first - from NBA and NRL teams to Fortune 500 companies.

We haven't spoken loudly about it. We've focused on delivering results.

But 2026 is different.

This is the year we start sharing what we've learned from implementing AI inside real organisations, where real numbers are on the line.

In this session, we broke down exactly how we helped a company reduce costs by $2.3M using AI, and how we measured that impact.

Most people talk about what AI could do.

But very few show how it actually moves financial metrics inside a business - and how to measure that impact properly.

Over the past year, we've refined a practical ROI modelling framework that we now use in every client engagement to pressure-test use cases before anything gets built.

And during the webinar, we gave that model away for free.

If you missed it, I've got something for you.

You can watch the full recording HERE - and at the end, you'll get access to the exact ROI template we use with our clients.

Enjoy - and keep an eye out for the next session. We've got a lot to share.

Liam.
